title: Fair-Use Cache Keys, TTL, Clock Injection, Copies, and Eviction · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Cache Key
summary: The cache keys raw commands, uses time.Now deep inside methods, returns mutable shared slices, never expires failures, and grows without a capacity policy. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go cache key increment in bounded TTL resource cache with observable decisions. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
